TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kawabata = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Kawabata. 54 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 174 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 164 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 91%, Amis 1%, Paiwan 1%, Saysiyat 2%. Hangan alang Alang Kawabata. Thuyan alang Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn-u-fong-syang-hua-euyn-cun. Klbangan u-fung- syang- kun- swo- quri daya 3 km hiya, daya ayug tmapaq dhuq sipaw narac. Kndkilan lnglingay breenux. Kklaan ppanan Mgrig rulu: tduwa muda elug sng-daw 122 seyn (nang cing- kun-lu)kndadax cu-tung mquri daya, duri o muda pgriq igi paru hakaw u-fung, dhuq hakaw do bukuy tg kingal alang do kika alang Kawabata. Mlutuc teyn-c-syusan 部落電子地圖Teyn-c-syusan alang. Tnealang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Skari kari kari Tay-ya- kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Cing-caw-sida iyux skrana Klmukan, ida klwaan Tanah tunux siida gaga prtan kesacu Tanah tunux thjil miyah mniq breenux, pusu mniq daya hunac daha hini, daya o mniyah seejiq Ta-ka-nan-se, Lwo-san- sayang do yasa empahun ka hparaw seejiq hini naqih hari klwaun, kika rngagan na ka qbsurang bukun ka keysacu Tanah tunux mdudul dsun thjil kana ka nniqan sjiqun, yasa egu ka Hangan Sun, ida knttu lwanun na Sun-cya-cwan kdjiyax, huna do mniyah May-pa-lay-se Cung-sing saying ksun. Kklaan rrigan Pnyahan bnadas Gaya Tay-ya-cu : thjil ni skrana alang.
S.PHON: = kawabata = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kawabata. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, sajsijat *%. ħaŋan alaŋ alaŋ kawabata. tħujan alaŋ nniqan alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən-u-*oŋ-sjaŋ-ħua-əujn-ʦun. klbaŋan u-*uŋ- sjaŋ- kun- swo- quɾi daja * km ħija, daja ajug tmapaq dħuq sipaw naɾaʦ. kndkilan lŋliŋaj bɾəənux. kklaan ppanan mgɾig ɾulu: tduwa muda əlug sŋ-daw *** sən (naŋ ʦiŋ- kun-lu)kndadax ʦu-tuŋ mquɾi daja, duɾi o muda pgɾiq igi paɾu ħakaw u-*uŋ, dħuq ħakaw do bukuj tg kiŋal alaŋ do kika alaŋ kawabata. mlutuʦ tən-ʦ-sjusan ******tən-ʦ-sjusan alaŋ. tnəalaŋ səəɟiq taj-ja-ʦu. skaɾi kaɾi kaɾi taj-ja- kaɾi tlu. snħijaan pnjaħan alaŋ ʦiŋ-ʦaw-sida ijux skɾana klmukan, ida klwaan tanaħ tunux siida gaga pɾtan kəsaʦu tanaħ tunux tħɟil mijaħ mniq bɾəənux, pusu mniq daja ħunaʦ daħa ħini, daja o mnijaħ səəɟiq ta-ka-nan-sə, lwo-san- sajaŋ do jasa əmpaħun ka ħpaɾaw səəɟiq ħini naqiħ ħaɾi klwaun, kika ɾŋagan na ka qbsuɾaŋ bukun ka kəsaʦu tanaħ tunux mdudul dsun tħɟil kana ka nniqan sɟiqun, jasa əgu ka ħaŋan sun, ida knttu lwanun na sun-ʦja-ʦwan kdɟijax, ħuna do mnijaħ maj-pa-laj-sə ʦuŋ-siŋ sajiŋ ksun. kklaan ɾɾigan pnjaħan bnadas gaja taj-ja-ʦu : tħɟil ni skɾana alaŋ.
S.FORM: = Kawabata = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Kawabata. 54 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 174 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 164 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 91%, Amis 1%, Paiwan 1%, Saysiyat 2%. Hangan alang Alang Kawabata. Thuyan alang Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn-u-fong-syang-hua-euyn-cun. Klbangan u-fung- syang- kun- swo- quri daya 3 km hiya, daya ayug tmapaq dhuq sipaw narac. Kndkilan lnglingay breenux. Kklaan ppanan Mgrig rulu: tduwa muda elug sng-daw 122 seyn (nang cing- kun-lu)kndadax cu-tung mquri daya, duri o muda pgriq igi paru hakaw u-fung, dhuq hakaw do bukuy tg kingal alang do kika alang Kawabata. Mlutuc teyn-c-syusan 部落電子地圖Teyn-c-syusan alang. Tnealang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Skari kari kari Tay-ya- kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Cing-caw-sida iyux skrana Klmukan, ida klwaan Tanah tunux siida gaga prtan kesacu Tanah tunux thjil miyah mniq breenux, pusu mniq daya hunac daha hini, daya o mniyah seejiq Ta-ka-nan-se, Lwo-san- sayang do yasa empahun ka hparaw seejiq hini naqih hari klwaun, kika rngagan na ka qbsurang bukun ka keysacu Tanah tunux mdudul dsun thjil kana ka nniqan sjiqun, yasa egu ka Hangan Sun, ida knttu lwanun na Sun-cya-cwan kdjiyax, huna do mniyah May-pa-lay-se Cung-sing saying ksun. Kklaan rrigan Pnyahan bnadas Gaya Tay-ya-cu : thjil ni skrana alang.
S.PHON: = kawabata = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kawabata. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, sajsijat *%. ħaŋan alaŋ alaŋ kawabata. tħujan alaŋ nniqan alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən-u-*oŋ-sjaŋ-ħua-əujn-ʦun. klbaŋan u-*uŋ- sjaŋ- kun- swo- quɾi daja * km ħija, daja ajug tmapaq dħuq sipaw naɾaʦ. kndkilan lŋliŋaj bɾəənux. kklaan ppanan mgɾig ɾulu: tduwa muda əlug sŋ-daw *** sən (naŋ ʦiŋ- kun-lu)kndadax ʦu-tuŋ mquɾi daja, duɾi o muda pgɾiq igi paɾu ħakaw u-*uŋ, dħuq ħakaw do bukuj tg kiŋal alaŋ do kika alaŋ kawabata. mlutuʦ tən-ʦ-sjusan ******tən-ʦ-sjusan alaŋ. tnəalaŋ səəɟiq taj-ja-ʦu. skaɾi kaɾi kaɾi taj-ja- kaɾi tlu. snħijaan pnjaħan alaŋ ʦiŋ-ʦaw-sida ijux skɾana klmukan, ida klwaan tanaħ tunux siida gaga pɾtan kəsaʦu tanaħ tunux tħɟil mijaħ mniq bɾəənux, pusu mniq daja ħunaʦ daħa ħini, daja o mnijaħ səəɟiq ta-ka-nan-sə, lwo-san- sajaŋ do jasa əmpaħun ka ħpaɾaw səəɟiq ħini naqiħ ħaɾi klwaun, kika ɾŋagan na ka qbsuɾaŋ bukun ka kəsaʦu tanaħ tunux mdudul dsun tħɟil kana ka nniqan sɟiqun, jasa əgu ka ħaŋan sun, ida knttu lwanun na sun-ʦja-ʦwan kdɟijax, ħuna do mnijaħ maj-pa-laj-sə ʦuŋ-siŋ sajiŋ ksun. kklaan ɾɾigan pnjaħan bnadas gaja taj-ja-ʦu : tħɟil ni skɾana alaŋ.
